rulings.Case Title: LARRY SUBLETT VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendants Atlas Heating And Ventilating Company, Lts., Lamons Gasket Company, And Underground Construction Company, Inc.S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant California Drywall Co.'s joinder to Atlas Heating and Ventilating Company, Ltd., Lamons Gasket Company and Underground Construction Company, Inc.'s motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint or, in the alternative, motion to dismiss previously litigated claims is off calendar at its request. = (503/TLJ)
